title: FlashbackOutlineFix
description: Fixed container block outline issue for flashback
body:
# Fixed in Flashback v0.3.0 1.21.9 & 1.21.10

Flashback uses spectator mode to render videos, which causes block outlines to appear when the camera passes through container blocks. This mod fixes that issue.
![:D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee15987da8c3d69600fc9e99b4ce6edfdc961b63_0.webp)
